judge_result.short_rationale: Matches the canonical skin-exposure sequence: remove contaminated clothing immediately, rinse skin with plenty of water for 15-20 minutes, then call poison control or a doctor. The added do-not-keep-wearing-contaminated-clothing warning is grounded and usable.
